name: sobat-komputer
description: Sobat Komputer V2 is a lightweight, high-performance, responsive multi-page static website for **New Sobat Komputer** located in Kejobong, Purbalingga. Built with zero-build requirements using semantic HTML5, clean CSS3 styling, and modern ES6 vanilla JavaScript.
